actionConfiguration.body:
SELECT
    a.MicrossSalesOrderReference,
    a.QuestionId,
    q.Question,
    a.ResponsiblePerson,
    a.Action,
    a.DueDate,
    a.AnsweredBy,
    a.Status,
		a.ParentActionId,
		a.id
FROM dbo.POH_Answers a
JOIN dbo.Admin_Questions q
    ON a.QuestionId = q.id
WHERE 
    a.IsLatest = 1
    AND a.YesNo = 0
    AND a.DueDate IS NOT NULL
		AND MicrossSalesOrderReference = {{ Select_FA.selectedOptionValue }}

ORDER BY a.DueDate ASC;
